meaning: n.外形,形状,形态,(尤指女子的)体形,身段,形式vt.制作,定形,使成形,塑造,使符合vi.成形,形成,成长
examples: The knives were bent out of shape.
She had a classical, womanly shape.
No matter what shape it takes, a night-time economy relies on a night-time workforce.
The four-day hike can be completed by anyone in reasonable shape, ovenighting in huts or campsites.
